paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.06, with a 2.11% change from the prior close and a -30.08% change over a 21-session window. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Sources such as simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance have reported on these developments, with one article questioning whether the bull case for the company has changed.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including multiple 8-K forms related to the convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of Miles Everson. Additionally, there was a SCHEDULE 13D/A filing and a DFAN14A filing related to the withdrawal of a solicitation to call a special meeting of shareholders. There has been 1 Form 4 filing in the feed.
